Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "And they departed from the mountains of Abarim, and pitched in the plains of Moab by Jordan n...". themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse.

themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "King Arad the Canaanite, which dwelt in the south in the land of Canaan, heard of the coming...". Word-study detail reinforces "מֶ֣לֶךְ: And king - a king".
